landing_badge: A New Way to Learn Languages with AI
landing_hero_desc: Say goodbye to awkward practice. GuaJi delivers natural, fluid voice conversations to help you build real speaking confidence.
landing_features_desc: Powered by cutting-edge AI voice technology for an immersive speaking practice experience
feature_1_desc: Your AI tutor listens, understands, and responds instantly to simulate real conversations
feature_2_desc: Custom practice scenarios tailored to your level and interests
feature_3_desc: Practice anytime, anywhere — no scheduling required
feature_4_desc: Detailed learning reports so you can see every step of improvement
landing_testimonials_desc: Thousands of learners have already improved their speaking with GuaJi
t1_text: After one month with GuaJi, my IELTS speaking score jumped from 5.5 to 6.5!
t2_text: I finally have the confidence to speak up in English meetings. Thank you, AI tutor!
t3_text: No more language barriers on trips abroad. The practice scenarios are so practical!
landing_pricing_desc: Choose the plan that fits you and start your speaking journey
landing_cta_desc: Sign up now and start your AI speaking practice journey
login_subtitle: Sign in to continue your learning
login_google_fail: Google sign-in failed, please try again
login_fail: Sign-in failed, please check your email and password
login_invalid_credentials: Incorrect email or password, please try again
register_subtitle: Start your AI speaking learning journey
password_placeholder: At least 8 chars, upper, lower & number
password_hint: Password must contain uppercase, lowercase letters and numbers
err_password_min: Password must be at least 8 characters
err_password_lower: Password must contain a lowercase letter
err_password_upper: Password must contain an uppercase letter
onboarding_subtitle: Tell us about your language background so we can customize your lessons.
daily_qa_listen_prompt: 🔊 Listen to a question from a native speaker
daily_qa_paywall_desc: Pro members can re-answer and swap the daily question without limits — reinforce your speaking rhythm anytime.
tour_step1_body: Tap here to choose a scenario and start practicing speaking.
tour_step2_body: Recap and check in every day — consistency drives progress.
tour_step3_body: Hold the mic and speak. The AI coaches and corrects you in real time.
tour_step_tasks_body: Three tasks a day: recap, Q&A, and practice — keep it up.
tour_step_streak_body: Check in every day — consistency drives progress.
tour_step_stats_body: See your total chats, learning days, and overall progress here.
tour_step_scenario_body: Tap here to choose a scenario and start practicing speaking.
tour_step_mic_body: Hold the mic and speak. The AI coaches and corrects you in real time.
tour_step_cc_body: Turn on immersive mode to follow live captions while you speak.
forgot_subtitle: Enter your email and we will send a reset link
forgot_sent: If that email is registered, a password reset email has been sent (link valid for 30 minutes).
forgot_error: Failed to send, please try again later
reset_subtitle: Enter and confirm your new password
reset_success: Password reset successfully, redirecting to login…
reset_failed: Reset failed; the link may have expired, please request again
reset_no_token: Missing reset token, please use the link from the email
reset_too_short: Password must be at least 6 characters
phone_cn_unsupported: China mainland (+86) numbers are not supported for SMS login yet. Please use email or Google sign-in.
phone_invalid: Invalid phone number (include country code, e.g. +1...)
phone_send_fail: Failed to send code, please try again later
phone_login_fail: Login failed, please check the code
